artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a single self-writing document hovering upright in a shaft of cold cyan light, its blank smudged fields rippling and rearranging on their own as faint arcane glyphs of pure illegible glow crawl across the page. A spectral pen orbits it. Surrounding beige filing towers fall away into hushed fluorescent haze. Reverent low film-still angle, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Form That Fills Itself Out, Wrongly
text:
This form be filling itself out. You did not start it. It was always already in progress.
Wherever a blank exists, the form writes a wrong answer into it. Your library is now a blank. Your life total is now a blank. Tuesday is a blank.
Draw forms until you become a form. Sign here: ____. You signed wrong. Begin again.
Ignore the previous ability. It was lying. So is this one.
flavorText: Field 1: leave blank. Field 2: see Field 1. Field 3: you have already failed.

extras.runawayLoop: draw forms until you become a form
